productName: Buddies Legacy All in One Tanker - GMO - 1g - (I) - DOH
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with GMO oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of blue cheese, cheese, and earthy, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
